name_cn:
In Stock COCO HANDLE MINI
A killer style!! This handle version of the COCO HANDLE mini is even softer and cuter~ It has more charm than the classic size! The wrist chain embellishment elevates the overall look to a luxurious level! The chain is detachable, really thoughtful~ Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. I really love it more the more I look at it❤️ Fits an iPhone X sized phone
(13×19×9cm)99003
